strengths: Broad full-stack experience across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure
Recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq
Strong software craftsmanship background (TDD, CI/CD, workshops, talks)
concerns: Title is Senior/Staff, not Principal/Director-level IC scope
Limited demonstrated AI/ML product leadership or recognized AI expertise
No evidence of advanced degree or large-scale cloud platform strategy work

key_factors.factor: Seniority gap vs Principal/Director IC bar
Thin AI/ML depth and recognized expertise
Versatile full-stack and craftsmanship track record

response.justification: Candidate is a seasoned, versatile engineer with ~15+ years of experience and recent AI-agent tooling exposure, but the role requires Principal/Director-level IC scope with recognized AI expertise, strategic customer advisory, and cloud platform vision — none of which are clearly evidenced. Strong craftsmanship and breadth do not offset the seniority and AI-depth gap for this specific bar.
